name: Company Profile Template
tagline: About, Services, Portfolio, and Why Us — ready to send to a client or partner today.
differentiator: Structured around a real Portfolio & Case Examples table, not just an "About Us" paragraph — built to prove your work, not just describe it.
description: A professional company profile covering About Us, Services, Portfolio & Case Examples, Why Choose Us, and Contact — the document you hand a prospective client or partner before the first real conversation.
whatsInside: About Us + At a Glance facts table
whoFor: Freelancers and small agencies who need to look established before they technically are.
